prompt_per_variant.teal: Sprite sheet VFX, 12 frames, 160×160px each, transparent background. Tile disappear effect. Teal color #7EC8E3 burst: frame 1-3 expand to 1.15x with squash deform, frame 4 collapse and shoot 4-6 small teal round particles outward at 45°/135°/225°/315°, frames 5-12 particles scatter and fade. Animal Crossing bounce curve. Hand-drawn watercolor style.

prompt_per_variant.gold: Sprite sheet VFX, 12 frames, 160×160px each, transparent background. Golden #F5A623 tile disappear burst, same animation pattern, golden star-dot particles.
prompt_per_variant.green: Sprite sheet VFX, 12 frames, 160×160px each, transparent background. Green #7DBE77 tile disappear burst, leaf-like particle dots.
prompt_per_variant.red: Sprite sheet VFX, 12 frames, 160×160px each, transparent background. Red #E05050 tile disappear burst, same animation.
prompt_per_variant.navy: Sprite sheet VFX, 12 frames, 160×160px each, transparent background. Navy #2A3650 tile disappear burst, cooler particle dots.

branch_plan.prompt: Sprite sheet VFX, 24 frames, 256×256px each, transparent background. Rotating golden lighthouse beam effect #F5C842. Each frame rotates beam 15°. Warm white-gold glow halo around center lighthouse point. Watercolor style soft golden light. Frames loop seamlessly.

Sprite sheet VFX, 8 frames, 120×60px each, transparent background. Golden combo x2 bubble pop: frame 1 bubble at scale 0, frame 2-3 spring pop to 1.1x, frame 4 settle 1.0x, frames 5-8 float upward and fade. Golden yellow #F5C842. No text baked in. Watercolor style bubble shape.

Sprite sheet VFX, 10 frames, 140×70px each, transparent background. Coral orange combo x3 bubble pop, larger than x2. Warm orange #EE8C55 bubble with spring pop animation. Frame 1 scale 0, frames 2-4 spring pop 1.15x overshoot, settle, float and fade. No text.

Sprite sheet VFX, 12 frames, 180×90px each, transparent background. Large golden combo x5+ celebration bubble. Bright gold #F5C842 with multi-color shimmer. Big spring pop with glow ring around bubble edge. Frames 1-12 full animation sequence. No text.

branch_plan.particle_texture_prompt: Sakura petal shape, 32×32px, transparent background. 5-petal cherry blossom pink #FFB7C5, organic slightly asymmetric shape, soft watercolor style, no outline. Single petal for particle texture.
Snowflake shape, 24×24px, transparent background. 6-point soft snowflake, cold white-blue #D0E8F8, organic slightly irregular shape. Watercolor style soft snowflake for particle texture.
